description: The harness installation and hook wiring contract. Each component that needs harness hooks (currently agent-provenance/cairn) exposes install/uninstall/doctor and wires hooks into the harness settings file. The suite's bootstrap calls each component's own install-harness; it never reimplements hook wiring.

hooks.description: List of hook handlers for one event
Map of event name to hook handler list

doctor_check: cairn._doctor._check_harness_wired verifies all HOOK_EVENTS are present in settings
invariants: Installation is idempotent — re-running changes nothing already done
Doctor detects missing hooks and reports 'missing hooks' with the event name
Hermes harness is provisional — not in supported_harnesses
